action_text: Open the filter condition field dropdown ("-- choose field --")
rationale: We need to build a filter; first step is choosing the field. This opens the filter condition field selector so we can pick "Short description".

action_text: Select "Short description" in the list’s field-specific search dropdown
rationale: Alternative quick-filter path: set the list search to target the Short description field, enabling a direct contains search via the header search box.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7" into the list search box
rationale: If the header search is already set to Short description, entering the target string will quickly narrow the list to matching rows.
Another route is enabling the column search row, which adds per-column inputs; we can then filter the Short description column by the target text.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Using the column’s options often provides filtering actions (e.g., Show Matching/Filter...). Opening this menu may allow setting a filter on Short description.
